realistic_test_cases.title: Almaty coal-to-clean-heating signal — 3 activated lenses, preserved disagreement

input.signal_text: High household heating costs and coal-smoke pollution across a pilot cohort of homes in the Almaty region.

activated_lenses.name: Illumination & Energy Transition
activated_lenses.mission: Is the organisation moving toward clean energy with credible pace?

activated_lenses.name: Protection of Vulnerable Groups
activated_lenses.mission: What systems exist to prevent harm to people with lower power or legal standing?

activated_lenses.name: Kneeling & Equitable Access
activated_lenses.mission: Are products and services accessible to all — not only the privileged?

positions.recommended_next_analysis: Confirm technical feasibility and cost basis.

positions.concern: Vulnerable/elderly households need a subsidised path.
Without a subsidy mechanism, only already-advantaged households may benefit.
